summary.miss_rate_definition: Fraction of test files that actually FAILED (not errored) but were NOT selected by the RTS selector. Lower is better. 0.00% = perfect recall.

commits.commit_message: Only show types in arg descriptions
Fix a few type annotations in fields and class_registry (#2756)
Document base field deprecations in API docs (#2750)
Add top-level API to API docs; use explicit references to Schema (#2740)
Fix typing for schema param of _bind_to_schema (#2724)
Various typing improvements to fields module (#2723)
Fixes and improvements to Nested typing (#2721)
Replace type comments with inline typing (#2718)
Use format specifiers instead of percent format
Improve type hint formatting for Field, Nested and Function fields to resolve PyCharm warnings (#2657)
